overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a foggy, abandoned urban street in autumn. The environment features cracked pavement, historic brick row houses, and overgrown vegetation, with the character eventually entering a cemetery through a stone gate. The atmosphere is desolate and misty with muted post-apocalyptic color grading.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned residential street with brick buildings

events.description: location text 'Lambeth' appears on screen indicating the area name
passing the red-leaved tree, large historic building comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down cracked pavement past a brick building on the right, approaching a large red-leaved tree

entered.detail: large tree with bright red foliage standing prominently in the middle of the street ahead
two-story brick building with white-framed windows and weathered facade
damaged pavement with large potholes, cracks, and debris scattered across the surface
tall black lamppost with curved arm and lantern top

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy abandoned street with a brick building on the right. A prominent red-leaved tree stands ahead in the center of the road. The location name 'Lambeth' appears on screen as the character approaches the tree and a large historic building comes into view on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with stone row houses

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a long stretch of historic row houses on the left, following the black iron fence on the right

entered.detail: long continuous three-story stone building with multiple chimneys, arched doorways, and shuttered windows
tall wrought iron fence with pointed tips running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the street now flanked by a long historic stone building on the left and a black iron fence on the right. The fog persists, obscuring distant details. The red tree and brick building from the previous section are now behind as the character moves deeper into the residential area.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban area approaching cemetery entrance

events.description: row houses recede, stone gate pillars of cemetery become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the end of the row houses toward a gated entrance with stone pillars, navigating around overgrown vegetation

entered.detail: tall ornate stone pillars marking the entrance to a cemetery, visible through the fog ahead
dense untamed vegetation and bushes encroaching on the path from the left side

segments.scene_description: As the row houses fall behind, the character approaches a more open area with dense overgrowth on the left. Through the fog, tall stone gate pillars marking a cemetery entrance become visible ahead. The black iron fence continues along the right side as the path leads toward the gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: cemetery entrance with stone gate and iron fence

events.description: character walks through the stone gate into the cemetery grounds

agents.ego_description: walking along the cemetery fence and passing through the stone gate into the grounds, moving from pavement to stone tiles

entered.detail: grassy area with scattered tombstones, monuments, and overgrown vegetation visible beyond the gate
black iron gate between stone pillars, partially open allowing passage into the cemetery

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the cemetery fence and passes through the stone gate entrance. The ground transitions from cracked asphalt to stone paving tiles. Inside the gate, tombstones and overgrown grass are visible as the character enters the cemetery grounds, leaving the street behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, foggy urban street that gradually transitions into the quiet grounds of a cemetery. It begins with a walk past brick buildings and a prominent red-leaved tree in the Lambeth district, moving forward as a large historic stone building emerges on the left. As the character pushes deeper into the residential area, the scenery shifts to a long stretch of stone architecture flanked by a black iron fence that persists through the thick mist. The environment then opens up into a more overgrown area where tall stone pillars become visible through the fog, marking the entrance to a graveyard. Finally, the camera passes through the stone gate as the cracked asphalt gives way to stone paving tiles, leading the character among tombstones and wild grass.
